_comment: Expected row counts after running synth-gen-casino-pilot.ts with default multipliers (players=100). These are minimums — actual counts depend on random generation. Layer 2 counts are lower bounds.

facets._comment: Sum of rows from emit_facets=true tables: players + visits + transactions + game_sessions + hotel_stays

graph_entity._comment: From emit_graph_entities=true tables: players + game_types + campaigns

graph_relation._comment: From emit_graph_relations=true tables: visits(player->player) + hotel_stays + event_registrations + game_sessions(game_type edge)

searchability._comment: After generation, ghostcrab_search should return results for these terms
